titleEn: Muyuan Foods prices Hong Kong IPO at top of range
titleZh: 牧原食品港股IPO定价上限，募资107亿港元
summaryZh: 中国最大生猪养殖企业牧原食品将其港股IPO价格定在发行区间上限，每股39港元，计划募资约107亿港元（13.7亿美元）。此次发行正值中国猪肉供应过剩、需求疲软、经济放缓导致猪价下跌、养殖利润承压之际。募资将用于育种、智慧养殖、营养管理和生物安全等领域的研发。
featuredReason: 牧原作为中国最大猪企，其港股上市募资明确投向智慧养殖等研发领域，反映了行业龙头对数字化、智能化升级的重视，为智慧畜牧技术落地提供了资金和场景支撑。
contentFull: Company News Muyuan Foods prices Hong Kong IPO at top of range China’s largest pig breeder targets HK$10.7 bln raise 5 February 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Asia China's biggest pig breeder, Muyuan Foods said on Wednesday it has determined to price its Hong Kong listing at its maximum offer price, aiming to raise about HK$10.69 billion ($1.37 billion) from the share sale, reported Reuters. The firm has offered 274 million H shares for the listing, with the offer price at HK$39 apiece, which sets the share sale to be one of Hong Kong's biggest so far this year.Muyuan Foods expects to announce the allocation results on February 5. The shares will make their debut on the Hong Kong bourse on February 6, according to a regulatory filing.The offering comes as China grapples with a pork glut amid weak demand and a slowing economy, which has pushed prices lower and squeezed farmers' margins.Proceeds from the share sale will be used to fund research and development in areas such as breeding, smart farming, nutrition management and biosecurity.($1 = 7.8109 Hong Kong dollars) Our Partners PIC dsm-firmenich Lanxess Hamlet Protein Global Ag Media More from this author More News View all Hog futures climb as pork cutout tops $101 - CME Market Trends Markets and economics 16 July 2026 1 minute read US to impose 25% tariff on most Brazilian imports from July 22 Markets Imports and Exports Trade 16 July 2026 2 minute read Beef, coffee and aircraft exempted as Lula vows WTO challenge Hog futures edge higher as pork cutout slips - CME Market Trends Markets and economics 15 July 2026 1 minute read Cattle futures hit lowest close since March Our Partners PIC dsm-firmenich Lanxess Hamlet Protein
translationZh:
中国最大生猪养殖企业牧原食品周三表示，已将其港股上市发行价定在发行区间上限，旨在通过此次股票发行募资约106.9亿港元（13.7亿美元）。该公司为此次上市发行了2.74亿股H股，发行价为每股39港元，这使得此次股票发行成为今年迄今香港最大的发行之一。

牧原食品预计将于2月5日公布配售结果。根据监管文件，该股票将于2月6日在香港交易所首日上市。

此次发行正值中国面临猪肉供应过剩、需求疲软和经济放缓之际，这些因素压低了猪价并挤压了养殖户的利润空间。

此次股票发行的收益将用于育种、智慧养殖、营养管理和生物安全等领域的研发。
contentHtml:
Muyuan Foods prices Hong Kong IPO at top of range 
China’s largest pig breeder targets HK$10.7 bln raise
